verbatim_quote: So one idea which is very natural, which a lot of people have been working on, including me for many years, is to use the same idea as LLMs, which is to train a generative model to predict what's going to happen next in a video, right? So take a video to a full video, corrupt it by masking the second half of it, let's say.
